title: Hiring Production Engineer at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions:
Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions!
